pi_items.source: install_gretl.sh dataset generation code and Google Web Search confirmation of POE5 dataset contents.

privileged_info_summary: I have verified that the task operates on the authentic 'food.gdt' dataset from 'Principles of Econometrics, 5th Edition' (Hill, Griffiths, Lim), which contains 40 real household survey observations of weekly income and food expenditure. The agent is strictly required to generate an X-Y scatter plot setting 'income' as the x-axis and 'food_exp' as the y-axis, and export it as a PNG image to the exact path '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/food_scatter.png'. Furthermore, I confirmed that the local 'verifier.py' is a stub, meaning the task evaluation relies entirely on an external VLM.
